title: TEKNOFEST Aviation AI
desc: As the Team Captain of Zenith AI, we developed an object detection (YOLO) and ORB-based visual odometry system for flying cars, securing a spot in the finals.

title: Vodafone AI Ideathon
desc: Won 3rd place by conceptualizing an innovative AI solution and presenting its strategic importance directly at the Vodafone Headquarters.

title: ODTU Sports Hackathon
desc: Won 3rd place by building SkateSync AI, the first platform to unify voice and vision AI for figure skating coaching.

title: Happy Hacking Space Code Jam
desc: Achieved 2nd place in the first-ever Code Jam organized by the community.

title: Hacettepe AI Club Datathon
desc: Won 2nd place by performing extensive customer insight analysis and exploratory data analysis using Pandas and NumPy.

title: Global AI Hub - Yapay Zekaya Giriş Bootcamp
desc: Selected as one of the top 3 projects.
